title: Near-Miss Well Control Incident
description: Bottom-hole pressure sensor failed during tripping out. Manual detection by driller prevented potential kick.
root_cause: Component fatigue in older sensor suite
vendor_actions_taken: Replaced entire sensor suite, updated manual monitoring protocols
business_impact: High - potential blowout risk (mitigated), 24h operational delay
follow_up_actions: Mandatory driller training on manual sign detection
